brainstorm.reviewerNotes: Brainstorm artifact = parent project PRD at docs/projects/P003-entity-system-redesign/prd.md. Scope crystallized via project decomposition: F11 (6-type taxonomy with kind + lifecycle_class), F2 (phase_events as sole state-change primitive), F3 (atomic promotion + drop enforce_immutable_entity_type trigger), F12 (split register_entity raises-on-conflict from upsert_entity idempotent; audit 14+ call sites). Same pattern as predecessor feature 108.
